messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0014",
  "title": "点点数据-二次元移动游戏体验评测方法与原则",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10-11"
}

Section text:
点点数据-二次元移动游戏体验评测方法与原则
数据、用户、专家三位一体 构建科学系统评测体系
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
针对二次元移动游戏的体验评测，点点数据构建了一套科学且系统的评估体系：以产品的大数据表现作为基础，结合海量用户评价进行综合分析，并将用户体验专家的深度评估作
为核心判断标准。在评价过程中，我们始终坚持以用户为中心，并将产品创新与游戏体验视为评估基石。同时，严格遵循全面性、价值导向、客观可量化及情感化体验等核心原则，
从而确保整个评价体系兼具系统性与科学性。
大数据表现
用户评价
专家评估
结合点点数据平台中有关二次元移动游戏
的收入、下载、活跃、留存、使用分布、
用户特征等关键数据表现，结合产品本身
的发展阶段进行客观评测。
综合App Store、Google Play、TapTap、
好游快爆等第三方游戏平台上的用户评分、
用户评论、以及各类社区论坛社交媒体上
的用户发声进行综合考量。
组织点点数据游戏专家团队对二次元移动
游戏进行画面、玩法、系统、活动、界面、
创新等多方面进行综合评价。
1
2
3
4
5
6
评价原则
用户沉浸
核心驱动
公平感知与价值
情感联结与社区
技术表现与适配
诚信运营与长期主义
游戏是否成功让我“代入”
其中，关心这个世界的命
运和角色的故事
支撑玩家日复一日
登录游戏的实质性
目标和动力
玩家进行付费时，是否感到
被尊重而非被算计，是否觉
得“物有所值”
游戏是否让玩家感到自己
是某个有趣社群的一份子
美术表现与技术优化
是否能满足不同设备
玩家的沉浸体验
研发厂商与运营团队是否
有能力和诚意将这款游戏
长久健康地运营下去
© 2025 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
10

message.content:
**Topics:** Methodology and core principles for evaluating ACG (二次元) mobile game experiences; construction of a scientific evaluation framework.
**Entities:** 点点数据 (DianDian Data), App Store, Google Play, TapTap, 好游快爆, DianDian Data Game Expert Team.
**Dates:** 2025 (copyright/publication year).
**Definitions/Concepts:** "Data-User-Expert" triad evaluation system; six core evaluation principles: User Immersion (代入感与角色/世界关怀), Core Drive (日常登录的实质性目标与动力), Fair Perception & Value (付费尊重感与物有所值), Emotional Connection & Community (社群归属感), Technical Performance & Adaptation (多设备美术与技术优化), Honest Operation & Long-termism (研发运营诚意与长期健康运营).
**Procedures/Methods:** Three-component assessment workflow: (1) Big data analysis contextualized by product lifecycle stage; (2) Aggregation of user ratings, reviews, and social/forum feedback from major app stores and gaming platforms; (3) Expert panel evaluation across graphics, gameplay, systems, events, UI, and innovation. Guided by principles of comprehensiveness, value-orientation, objective quantifiability, and emotional experience.
**Claims:** The framework is user-centric, scientifically systematic, and treats product innovation and gameplay experience as foundational. It ensures evaluation rigor by combining quantitative data, crowd-sourced feedback, and expert qualitative judgment.
**Metrics & Evidence Types:** Quantitative metrics: revenue, download volume, active users, retention rates, usage distribution, user demographics. Qualitative evidence: platform ratings, user comments, social media/forum discourse, expert multi-dimensional assessments.
**Figures/Tables:** Structured framework diagram/list outlining the three evaluation components and six evaluation principles. Source attributed to DianDian Data independent research and design.

response_text:
**Topics:** Methodology and core principles for evaluating ACG (二次元) mobile game experiences; construction of a scientific evaluation framework.
**Entities:** 点点数据 (DianDian Data), App Store, Google Play, TapTap, 好游快爆, DianDian Data Game Expert Team.
**Dates:** 2025 (copyright/publication year).
**Definitions/Concepts:** "Data-User-Expert" triad evaluation system; six core evaluation principles: User Immersion (代入感与角色/世界关怀), Core Drive (日常登录的实质性目标与动力), Fair Perception & Value (付费尊重感与物有所值), Emotional Connection & Community (社群归属感), Technical Performance & Adaptation (多设备美术与技术优化), Honest Operation & Long-termism (研发运营诚意与长期健康运营).
**Procedures/Methods:** Three-component assessment workflow: (1) Big data analysis contextualized by product lifecycle stage; (2) Aggregation of user ratings, reviews, and social/forum feedback from major app stores and gaming platforms; (3) Expert panel evaluation across graphics, gameplay, systems, events, UI, and innovation. Guided by principles of comprehensiveness, value-orientation, objective quantifiability, and emotional experience.
**Claims:** The framework is user-centric, scientifically systematic, and treats product innovation and gameplay experience as foundational. It ensures evaluation rigor by combining quantitative data, crowd-sourced feedback, and expert qualitative judgment.
**Metrics & Evidence Types:** Quantitative metrics: revenue, download volume, active users, retention rates, usage distribution, user demographics. Qualitative evidence: platform ratings, user comments, social media/forum discourse, expert multi-dimensional assessments.
**Figures/Tables:** Structured framework diagram/list outlining the three evaluation components and six evaluation principles. Source attributed to DianDian Data independent research and design.
